document_summary: Joint research agreement between Mixue Bingcheng Co., Ltd. (Party A) and Peking University (Party B) for the project 'Research on New Trends'. Dehuan Liu named as Project Principal and Contact for Party B. Total service fee RMB 610,000 for 2021. Project period Oct. 20, 2021 to Dec. 31, 2023. Deliverables include one monograph and four phased research reports on 'Research on New Trends in Chinese Young People'.

snippets.text: # Agreement on Joint Research of Mixue Bingcheng and Peking University
snippets.subject: Title of joint research agreement between Mixue Bingcheng and PKU
snippets.reasoning: Title of the research agreement naming Liu as Project Principal.

snippets.subject: Liu designated as Project Principal for Peking University
snippets.reasoning: Directly names Liu as Project Principal, the lead researcher on behalf of PKU.

snippets.text: 4.1.1 Total service fee of the project in 2021: (In figures) RMB610,000, (in words) RMB six hundred and ten thousand only. (Tax- inclusive, with tax rate of \(3\%\) . The invoice tax rate in follow- up cooperation shall be subject to the latest taxation policy of the state).
snippets.subject: Project service fee: RMB 610,000 for 2021
snippets.reasoning: Documents the RMB 610,000 service fee for the research project led by Liu.

snippets.text: Party A and Party B cooperate on the project "Research on New Trends", which shall be initiated on Oct. 20, 2021 and ended on Dec. 31, 2023. During the cooperation term, Party B shall complete relevant researches in accordance with both parties' research demands and the Agreement. And Party B shall deliver project research achievements to Party A, including one monograph of Research on New Trends and four phased research reports.
snippets.subject: Project scope: Oct 2021 - Dec 2023, deliverables include monograph and 4 reports
snippets.reasoning: Describes the project timeline and deliverables Liu is responsible for as Project Principal.

snippets.text: ## Party A: Mixue Bingcheng Co., Ltd.
snippets.subject: Party A identified as Mixue Bingcheng Co., Ltd.
snippets.reasoning: Identifies the industry partner commissioning research from Liu's team at PKU.

relations.context: Mixue Bingcheng contracted PKU for 'Research on New Trends' project at RMB 610,000
Liu serves as Project Principal for PKU in the joint research agreement
